title: WHERE ... IN Returning Unexpected Row
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INT NOT NULL, c2 TEXT DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(c1));
CREATE TABLE t2(c3 DOUBLE, c4 INT NOT NULL, UNIQUE(c4));
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2) VALUES (1, 'A'), (2, NULL), (3, 'B');
SELECT c2 FROM t1 WHERE c2 IN (SELECT c3 FROM t2) UNION ALL SELECT c2 FROM t1 WHERE c2 IS NULL;
key_bug_features: c2 IN (SELECT c3 FROM t2) evaluation error
